title: geranium regelii
intro: Geranium regelii, also known as the Russian geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the geranium genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of geranium regelii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of geranium regelii include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
